headline: HP (HPQ) – Among the 12 High Yield Fortune 500 Stocks to Buy Now
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 4.86%, HP Inc. (NYSE:HPQ) is included among the 12 High Yield Fortune 500 Stocks to Buy Now. HP Inc. (NYSE:HPQ) provides personal computing, printing, 3D printing, hybrid work, gaming, and other related technologies in the United States and internationally.
